description_long: This helmet features a futuristic design with a predominantly gold outer shell and a large, dark, opaque face shield. The sides are adorned with vibrant, multi-colored segments in a rainbow pattern, while the rear is covered with tightly packed, vertical stripes in red, green, and white. On each side, there is a small, illuminated display panel with a green waveform and colored indicator lights, suggesting some electronic functionality. The helmet's surface is smooth and glossy, with a seamless integration of the colored panels and the main shell. The overall shape is rounded and aerodynamic, providing full head coverage and a visually striking appearance.
description: A gold, full-coverage helmet with a dark face shield, rainbow side panels, and a striped rear, featuring illuminated electronic displays on each side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dark, opaque face shield bordered by gold and rainbow-colored side panels.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the rainbow segments, the gold shell, and the illuminated electronic display with a waveform and indicator lights.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the densely packed vertical stripes in red, green, and white, with the gold shell framing the pattern.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the rainbow segments, gold shell, and another illuminated display panel.
attribute_graphic_design: Rainbow color segments on the sides, vertical red/green/white stripes on the rear, and illuminated electronic display panels; overall style is abstract and futuristic.
